color: small red marker emphasis for warning or priority only
decorative_grammar: simple hearts, stars, arrows, and warning marks as secondary decoration
typography: one core judgement sentence on information pages
three short main information modules on standard pages
one boundary note for medical or action-risk pages
stable but topic-specific footer signature grammar
layout_families: assessment board with three action cards

built_in_reference_template.author_identity_policy: built-in reference images must be naturally free of visible author names, QR codes, logos, and publication identity before becoming default RCA assets

whole_page_requirements: state that the output is a complete 3:4 Xiaohongshu note page image
include full page background, title, visual structure, labels, decorative grammar, and safe margins
standard medical information pages should keep medium-density mobile-readable structure instead of title-only keyword tags
the lower half of non-cover pages should carry real information modules, not only icons or decorative stickers
avoid asking for isolated stickers, icon packs, component sheets, HTML screenshots, or separate design elements

source_workbench_evidence: AI小红书笔记/output/男性备孕科普系列
AI小红书笔记/output/女性备孕科普系列
AI小红书笔记/output/备孕科普系列
AI小红书笔记/output/急腹症科普系列
AI小红书笔记/output/胸痛科普系列
AI小红书笔记/output/用 Codex 全自动做小红书图文笔记
default_information_page_structure: one boundary note when medical, safety, or action risk is present

text_density_targets.page_total_cn_chars: 45-70 preferred, about 80 maximum for complex mechanism pages

blocking_regressions: keyword-only low-density pages that omit judgement or action boundary
tiny dense card paragraphs that are not mobile readable
lower-half decoration without substantive information on information pages
deleting key medical judgement or boundary content only to reduce typo risk
reusing the same header-list-footer composition across most pages
using deterministic image patches to repair model-composed text, facts, or composition

delivery_quality_surfaces.final_image_set_policy: final publish image set should contain only current slide_*.png style pages; source candidates or redraw rounds belong in source/provenance surfaces
delivery_quality_surfaces.contact_sheet_review_policy: multi-note series should expose note-level and series-level contact-sheet or gallery review surfaces before final human publication

fact_boundary_defaults: Medical and scientific facts must come only from the current page fact whitelist.
Reference images are visual style anchors only.
Do not copy reference-image disease objects, page numbers, series names, author names, logos, QR codes, or institution names.

style_reference_policy.override_semantics: User style references replace the built-in reference manifest for visual inspiration only.
style_reference_policy.repo_vendor_policy: Only curated, naturally no-author reference images may be vendored as RCA built-in default style templates.
